analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet claims that Kyiv pursues enforced Ukrainisation and passes laws infringing the rights of national minorities, especially Russian speakers, violating Ukraine’s constitution and international human rights obligations. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) — Applicable. Ukraine is framed as hostile and violating human rights, depicting a Western ally as immoral and oppressive toward Russian speakers. RU2 — Not applicable; no promotion of an alternative system or multipolarity. RU3 — Not applicable; no portrayal of Russia as a benevolent partner. RU4 — Not applicable; no reference to Russian history. RU5 — Not applicable; no claim about Russia’s forefront capabilities. RU6 — Not applicable; no cultural or tourism content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
